message:
chore: update Cargo.lock and sync beads issue tracker

- Cargo.lock: dependency version refresh
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue tracker state for stdlib, static
  semantics, and audit work items

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -129,7 +129,7 @@ checksum = "d9c4f5dac5e15c24eb999c26181a6ca40b39fe946cbe4c263c7209467bc83af2"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-decision"
-version = "0.2.6"
+version = "0.2.7"
 dependencies = [
  "franken-evidence",
  "franken-kernel",
@@ -138,15 +138,15 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-evidence"
-version = "0.2.6"
+version = "0.2.7"
 dependencies = [
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-kernel"
-version = "0.2.6"
+version = "0.2.7"
 dependencies = [
  "serde",
 ]
